---
title: "The Nestorian monument of Hsî-an Fû in Shen-hsî, China with . . . a translation  . . [and] a sketch of subsequent Christian missions in China and their present state"
---

## The Nestorian monument of Hsî-an Fû in Shen-hsî, China with . . . a translation  . . [and] a sketch of subsequent Christian missions in China and their present state

**Author:** James Legge
**Date:** 1888
**Imprint:** London: Trübner

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
